column1: # Curated diverse-fungi benchmark set for Gene_Analysis_HMM.
# Chosen to span the fungal kingdom and (more importantly) the intron-density
# gradient that stresses the splice/intron model: from intron-poor budding
# yeasts (~0-0.05 introns/gene) through filamentous ascomycetes (~1-2) to
# taxon_query is resolved to the best annotated RefSeq (fallback GenBank)
# assembly via the NCBI datasets API at build time, so accessions are never
